export const TOKEN_CATALOG = [
  { key: "ORG_NAME", label: "Organization Name", description: "Trading name", group: "Identity", example: "Acme Healthcare" },
  { key: "ORG_LEGAL_NAME", label: "Legal Entity", description: "Registered legal name", group: "Identity", example: "Acme Healthcare Pty Ltd" },
  { key: "ORG_ABN", label: "ABN", description: "Australian Business Number", group: "Identity", example: "12 345 678 901" },
  { key: "FACILITY_NAME", label: "Facility", description: "Primary facility / site", group: "Identity", example: "Acme Central Care" },
  { key: "SECTOR", label: "Sector", description: "Operating sector", group: "Identity", example: "Aged Care" },
  { key: "ORG_ADDRESS", label: "Address", description: "Registered address", group: "Contact", example: "12 Example St, Sydney NSW 2000" },
  { key: "ORG_PHONE", label: "Phone", description: "Main contact number", group: "Contact", example: "+61 2 1234 5678" },
  { key: "ORG_EMAIL", label: "Email", description: "Primary contact email", group: "Contact", example: "contact@acme.org" },
  { key: "ORG_WEBSITE", label: "Website", description: "Organization website", group: "Contact", example: "https://acme.org" },
  { key: "COMPLIANCE_MANAGER", label: "Compliance Manager", description: "Appointed compliance lead", group: "People", example: "Jane Smith" },
  { key: "CEO_NAME", label: "CEO", description: "Chief Executive", group: "People", example: "John Doe" },
  { key: "ORG_LOGO", label: "Logo URL", description: "Logo image URL", group: "Branding", example: "https://cdn.acme.org/logo.png" },
  { key: "ACCENT_COLOR", label: "Accent Color", description: "Brand accent color", group: "Branding", example: "#14B8A6" },
  { key: "HEADER_TEXT", label: "Header Text", description: "Document header line", group: "Branding", example: "Acme Healthcare — Confidential" },
  { key: "FOOTER_TEXT", label: "Footer Text", description: "Document footer line", group: "Branding", example: "© Acme Healthcare 2026" },
  { key: "ADOPTION_DATE", label: "Adoption Date", description: "Date the template was adopted", group: "Context", example: "2026-04-22" }
];
const STORAGE_KEY = "policynest.orgTokenValues";
const DEFAULT_ORG_VALUES = {
  ORG_NAME: "Acme Healthcare",
  ORG_LEGAL_NAME: "Acme Healthcare Pty Ltd",
  ORG_ABN: "12 345 678 901",
  FACILITY_NAME: "Acme Central Care",
  SECTOR: "Aged Care",
  ORG_ADDRESS: "12 Example Street, Sydney NSW 2000",
  ORG_PHONE: "+61 2 1234 5678",
  ORG_EMAIL: "contact@acme.org",
  ORG_WEBSITE: "https://acme.org",
  COMPLIANCE_MANAGER: "Jane Smith",
  CEO_NAME: "John Doe",
  ORG_LOGO: "",
  ACCENT_COLOR: "#14B8A6",
  HEADER_TEXT: "Acme Healthcare — Confidential",
  FOOTER_TEXT: "© Acme Healthcare 2026",
  ADOPTION_DATE: ""
};
export function getOrgTokenValues() {
  if (typeof window === "undefined") return { ...DEFAULT_ORG_VALUES };
  try {
    const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
    if (!raw) return { ...DEFAULT_ORG_VALUES };
    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
    return { ...DEFAULT_ORG_VALUES, ...parsed };
  } catch {
    return { ...DEFAULT_ORG_VALUES };
  }
}
export function setOrgTokenValues(values) {
  if (typeof window === "undefined") return;
  const current = getOrgTokenValues();
  const next = { ...current, ...values };
  window.localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(next));
}

//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
